Rijiju also criticised the INDIA bloc, alleging internal rifts and a lack of principles, while backing West Bengal's electoral roll revision ahead of polls.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/all-good-people-left-kejriwal-rijiju-hits-back-at-coercion-charge-as-raghav-chadha-6-rs-mps-join-bjp/articleshow/130569710.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/all-good-people-left-kejriwal-rijiju-hits-back-at-coercion-charge-as-raghav-chadha-6-rs-mps-join-bjp/articleshow/130569710.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Tue, 28 Apr 2026 10:18:40 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="44688" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-130570096,imgsize-44688.cms"/></item></channel></rss>
